zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Strangways於1427年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Thomas Strangways33歲，母親Catherine Neville28歲。她於1461年7月20日之前與Sir William Willoughby結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年2月在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Strangways于1427年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Thomas Strangways33岁，母亲Catherine Neville28岁。她于1461年7月20日之前与Sir William Willoughby结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年2月在她的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Strangways
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Strangeway
meanings: English: locative from Strangeways in Manchester (Lancs), probably ‘(place by) a stream with a strong current’: Old English strang + (ge)wæsc.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Strangways was born in 1427, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Thomas Strangways, was 33 and her mother, Catherine Neville, was 28. She married Sir William Willoughby before 20 July 1461. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in February 1485, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Strangways est née en 1427, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Strangways, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Catherine Neville, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Willoughby avant 20 juillet 1461. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en février 1485, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Strangways 1427 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Strangways 33 und ihre Mutter Catherine Neville 28. Sie hat vor 20. Juli 1461 Sir William Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Februar 1485 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Strangways è nata il nel 1427 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Strangways, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Catherine Neville, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Willoughby prima del 20 luglio 1461. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel febbraio 1485, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Strangwaysが1427年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Strangwaysは33歳，母Catherine Nevilleは28歳であった。1461年7月20日以前にSir William Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年2月に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Strangways(이)가 1427년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Strangways(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Neville(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1461년 7월 20일 이전 Sir William Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 2월 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Strangways nasceu em 1427, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Strangways, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Neville, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Willoughby antes 20 de julho de 1461. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1485, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Strangways родилась в 1427 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Strangways было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Neville, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Willoughby перед 20 июля 1461 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла февраль 1485 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

sm.between 1465 and November 1468: mai le 1465 e o'o I le Novema 1468

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Strangways nació en 1427, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Strangways, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Catherine Neville, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir William Willoughby antes de 20 de julio de 1461. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en febrero de 1485, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
